name: Maple Syrup Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, salt, baking powder, quick oats, walnuts, and shortening until well combined.
2. Add the egg, maple syrup, and vanilla to the mixture. Mix until all ingredients are thoroughly incorporated.
3. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a greased cookie sheet, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
4. Bake for 8-12 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
